--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

What do you want to do about this

Status: U
From: Michael Lee Michael.Lee@usss.dhs.gov
To: gmax1@mindspring.com
Subject: sponsor
Date: Mon, 3 Jul 2006 10:24:08 -0400
X-Priority: 3 (Normal)
Importance: Normal
X-Junkmail-Status: score=45/50,
host=mail1.usss.dhs.gov
X-Junkmail-SD-Raw: score=suspect(10),
refid=str=0001.0A090203.44A9264B.0014,ss=2,fgs=0,
ip=10.121.10.188,
so=2005-06-03 21:31:40,
dmn=5.2.4/2006-05-04
X-ELNK-Info: spv=0;
X-ELNK-AV: 0
X-ELNK-Info: sbv=1; sbrc=-0; sbf=cb; sbw=000;

G..greeting from the nations capitol. I hope all
is well and I look
forward to seeing you soon. The soccer season is
complete and the
girls had an outstanding season, I was wondering if
you guys were
interested in sponsoring the team again? Please
let me know and I
will have David Allen (team manager ) forward you a
list of
accomplishments and goals for next season which
starts in August
with a trip to San Diego. I miss you and please
keep in touch, I
will be in Hawaii from July 16- July 27th and then
it's off to
Jackson Hole Wyoming with the VP for the month of
August. Please
give my regards to Jeffery.

Thanks,

Mike
